title: Phase 1 Synthesis — YM Landscape and Attack Vector

analysis.object: T811: Phase 1 Synthesis — YM Landscape and Attack Vector depth analysis

eml_inf_source.description: EML-inf source = path integral measure over instanton moduli space (T809) + UV mode product (T800)

eml_finite_structure.description: EML-finite structure: instantons ({0,1,2,3}), lattice ({0,1,2}), OS axioms ({0,1,2}), conformal group (EML-2)

duy_bridge.description: DUY bridge: Hodge (proved) -> YM connections via Delta_d=+1 functor (T806-T807)

moduli_compactness.description: Instanton moduli space: compact after Uhlenbeck compactification (T809 + T807)

measure_target.description: Primary gap: path integral measure on compact moduli space -- formal GAGA analog

crack_identified.description: The crack: instanton moduli space is a Hodge-classified algebraic variety (T806). Hodge is proved. Does the Hodge measure (algebraic cycles) define a path integral measure?
crack_identified.reason: The crack: Hodge measure -> YM measure

t811_theorem.description: T811: Phase 1 synthesis. The crack is: instanton moduli space M_k is a Hodge-classified algebraic variety. Hodge proved -> M_k is well-defined. Path integral = integral over M_k (Hodge-classified). If the measure is the Hodge measure, YM is constructed. T811.
t811_theorem.reason: Attack vector: Hodge measure on instanton moduli = YM measure

analysis.theorem: T811: Phase 1 Synthesis — YM Landscape and Attack Vector (S1090).
